svg.title: Synalux POS — printer routing
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for printer routing. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Define which menu categories print to which devices
Routing evaluated at: order submit + course fire + void
Modifications inherit parent item's route unless overridden
Course fire (seat mode) respects fire_delay independently
KDS bump propagates void to all stations on the route
